{{Quote|We're also searching through the old Imperial archives at Kamparas, Boudolayz, and Obroa-skai, but so far we haven't found anything.|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], about the [[Caamas Document]]|<ref name="SotP" />}}
'''Boudolayz''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].

==History==
This planet had extensive [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] archives.<ref name="SotP" /> [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] was involved in an information raid on this planet to acquire data on [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Afsheen Makati]]. [[Kyle Katarn]], while serving with the [[Katarn Commandos]], also executed a mission on this world.

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
